data.title: Create scripts/bridge/ Python package directory
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Overview
Create the plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/ directory as an empty Python package. This is a scaffolding prerequisite that must complete before bridge handler extraction tasks (5ee9-8591, 9f0d-860d) run — those tasks place extracted event handlers inside this package.

## Files to Create
- plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/__init__.py — empty Python package init file

## Implementation
Create plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/__init__.py with content:
  """Bridge event handler package — populated by bridge-inbound and bridge-outbound extraction tasks."""

The extraction tasks (5ee9-8591: bridge-inbound handlers, 9f0d-860d: bridge-outbound handlers) will add re-export statements to this __init__.py as they create handler modules inside this package.

## Acceptance Criteria

Unit test exemption (integration exemption criterion 2: scaffolding task — no behavioral contract to assert, any test would be a change-detector verifying file existence only).

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/ directory exists
  Verify: test -d $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/bridge
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/__init__.py exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/__init__.py
